name: Inspection, Maintenance and Repair of Pressure Vessels
requirements: All pressure vessels must have a valid fitness certificate
External inspection every 2 years
Internal inspection every 4 years
Hydrostatic test every 8 years or after major repair
Thickness measurement records must be maintained
Corrosion rate calculations must be documented
Relief valve testing annually

name: Safety Aspects in Functional Design of Process Control Systems
requirements: All safety critical instruments must have redundancy
Safety Instrumented Systems (SIS) must comply with IEC 61511
Proof testing of safety valves at specified intervals
Emergency Shutdown (ESD) testing every 6 months
Control system cybersecurity assessment annually

name: Factories Act 1948 — Section 7A: General Duties of Occupier
authority: Ministry of Labour & Employment, Government of India
requirements: Provide and maintain plant and systems of work that are safe
Ensure safety and absence of risks in handling, storage, and transport
Provide information, instruction, training, and supervision for safety
Maintain working conditions that are safe and without health risks
Provide and maintain adequate means of egress

name: PESO Static & Mobile Pressure Vessels (Unfired) Rules 2019
requirements: Registration of all unfired pressure vessels with PESO
Competent person inspection certificate before commissioning
Annual inspection by competent person
Hydraulic test every 5 years
Maintain logbook of all inspections and repairs
Report any accident or dangerous occurrence within 24 hours

name: CPCB Emission Standards for Petroleum Refineries
requirements: SOx emissions below 50 mg/Nm³ from process heaters
NOx emissions below 350 mg/Nm³
Particulate matter below 50 mg/Nm³
Continuous Emission Monitoring System (CEMS) mandatory
Quarterly emission reports to SPCB
Fugitive emission monitoring (LDAR) program

name: IS 2825: Code for Unfired Pressure Vessels
requirements: Design calculations per IS 2825 or ASME Section VIII
Material test certificates for all pressure parts
Welding procedure qualification records (WPR/PQR)
Non-destructive testing (NDT) as per design code
Nameplate with design data mandatory
